name: gateway-manifest-ownership-failures
description: Failure-path fixtures for authoritative gateway manifest ownership and update ordering.

cases.name: concurrent_writer_manifest_race
setup: prepare two writers attempting to advance the same authoritative manifest generation
persist one candidate payload while the competing writer still holds an older generation view

cases.name: stale_manifest_generation
setup: persist a newer metadata payload generation on disk
present an older manifest pointer during restart

cases.name: truncated_manifest_file
setup: truncate authoritative manifest bytes before startup replay
attempt restart with incomplete manifest payload
